title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Business Post India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Business Post India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Business Post India! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Business Post India:
Business Post India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Business Post India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
